case_title: SARA HOUSTON VS. WING LAM YEUNG

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-01-2024 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO DEC-13-202. PLAINTIFF SARA HOUSTON IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WING LAM YEUNG IS PRESENT AND IS ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED MANDARIN INTERPERTER CONNIE CHEN #700105. PLAINTIFF REQUESTS A CONTINUANCE BEFORE THE START OF TODAY'S MATTER. DEFENDANT DOES NOT OPPOSE PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR A CONTINUANCE. JUDGE: DANIEL FLORES; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HOUSTON, SARA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT YEUNG, WING LAM $350.00 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $450.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF HOUSTON, SARA ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,500.00 FILED BY HOUSTON, SARA AS TO DEFENDANT YEUNG, WING LAM ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-01-2024 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE: $100.00 SERVED SEP-10-2024, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT YEUNG, WING LAM
STIPULATION TO USE A JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY HOUSTON, SARA YEUNG, WING LAM

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-13-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-13-2024 BY JUDGE PRO TEM. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF SARA HOUSTON AND DEFENDANT WING LAM YEUNG. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: WILLIAM LYNN. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. (D506)
DEPOSIT OF JUDGMENT DEBTOR, TRAN # H5724C18D001, TAG # 037833 BY DEFENDANT YEUNG, WING LAM
